title: MDU Result 2026 Declared for Multiple UG and PG Courses

detail.title: MDU Result 2026 Declared for Multiple UG and PG Courses
detail.short_info: MDU Result 2026 declared for B.Sc, BCA, MHM, B.Com, B.A and Other Courses. Check Maharshi Dayanand University Result 2026 direct link on official website mdu.ac.in.

sections.heading: MDU Result 2026 Declared for Multiple UG and PG Courses

content.text: Maharshi Dayanand University (MDU), Rohtak has officially released the MDU Result 2026 for various undergraduate and postgraduate courses including B.Sc, BCA, MHM, B.Com, B.A and other programmes. Students who appeared in the recent examinations can now check their results online.
MDU Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - mdu.ac.in. Students can check and download their results by entering their registration number or roll number on the result portal.
Students are advised to verify all details mentioned in the MDU result carefully and contact the university examination branch in case of any discrepancies.
Maharshi Dayanand University has published the latest results for multiple UG and PG courses. Students can now access their marks through the official portal using their credentials.

The result covers B.Sc, BCA, MHM, B.Com, B.A and several other undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. Students are advised to download and keep a printed copy of their MDU Result 2026 for future reference.

rows: B.Sc, BCA, MHM, B.Com, B.A and Other UG/PG Courses

content.text: MDU has activated the direct link to check MDU Result 2026 for various UG and PG courses. Students can view or download their results instantly through the official portal using the link provided in the table below.
Click on the View Result link and enter your registration number or roll number to access your MDU Result 2026.

links.label: MDU B.Sc, BCA, MHM, B.Com, B.A and Other Courses Result 2026

sections.heading: How to Download MDU Result 2026 Online

content.text: Students can check their MDU Result 2026 by following the simple steps given below:

items: Click on the Results or Examination Results section.
Select the link for Post Examination Result or Latest Results.
Enter your Registration Number or Roll Number.
Submit the details to view your result on the screen.
Download and take a printout of the MDU Result 2026 for future reference.
